response:
MOORE'S LAW WILL LIKELY CEASE TO HOLD TRUE WITHIN THE NEXT DECADE AS PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS OF SILICON TRANSISTORS BECOME INSURMOUNTABLE FOR CONTINUOUS DOUBLING OF PROCESSING POWER.

***

SPECIALISTS SPECULATE THAT QUANTUM COMPUTING AND THREE-DIMENSIONAL CHIP ARCHITECTURES MAY REPLACE THE CURRENT TRAJECTORY, MARKING THE END OF THE TRADITIONAL EXPONENTIAL GROWTH PREDICTED BY GORDON MOORE.

MOORE
